description: OpenAI's latest flagship model with strong agentic coding, knowledge work, and autonomous task execution.
GPT-5.4 with Thinking and Pro modes, top-tier reasoning and 1M token context window.
OpenAI's unified GPT-5 with Instant and Thinking modes for general and deep reasoning tasks.
OpenAI's most rigorous reasoning model designed for extremely challenging math, science and coding.
Fast, lightweight reasoning model succeeding o3-mini with improved speed and efficiency.
OpenAI's powerful reasoning model excelling at complex math, science and coding tasks.
Optimized for coding and instruction-following with up to 1M token context window.
Large-scale GPT model with enhanced world knowledge and reduced hallucinations.
Anthropic's most powerful model. #1 on SWE-bench (82%) and LM Arena (1504 Elo) with exceptional coding and reasoning.
Fast, high-performance coding model with improved reasoning over Sonnet 4.5.
Intermediate Opus upgrade with enhanced agentic orchestration and coding capabilities.
Major Opus upgrade with state-of-the-art coding benchmarks and advanced reasoning.
Anthropic's fastest model with significantly improved capabilities at low cost.
High-speed coding and reasoning model with major improvements over Sonnet 4.
Anthropic's flagship model excelling at complex, long-running coding and agentic tasks.
Improved coding and reasoning model available to free and paid users via API and integrations.
Google's most advanced model with 2M token context, Deep Think reasoning and top multilingual scores.
Next-gen Gemini with 2x reasoning improvement and advanced multimodal and agentic features.
Flagship reasoning and coding model with 1M token context and 100% on AIME 2025 math.
Fast, efficient model optimized for enterprise and developer use with thinking capabilities.
Multimodal model with improved speed and performance for general-purpose tasks.
400B parameter MoE model with 1M token context, high efficiency for general AI tasks.
Open-weight model with ultra-long 10M token context window and multimodal capabilities.
Llama 3.3 delivering Llama 3.1 405B quality at 70B size for efficient deployment.
Specialized code model supporting 80+ languages with 256K context and fill-in-the-middle.
Compact multimodal model with vision support and 128k context window.
Mistral's flagship model with state-of-the-art reasoning and coding capabilities.
xAI's most powerful model with advanced reasoning, multi-agent orchestration and coding tools.
Trained on the Colossus supercluster with deep reasoning and strong benchmark performance.
Open-weight reasoning model rivaling top proprietary models at a fraction of training cost.
Powerful open-source MoE model with strong coding performance and 1M context window.
Amazon's highly capable multimodal model with text, image and video understanding.
Amazon's low cost multimodal model for lightning-fast text, image and video tasks.
